global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a prominent logo and product display.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with a call to action for trying the product for free.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: The logo 'VantaStyle' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A minimalist representation of two rectangular products with rounded edges, resembling mirrors or screens.

elements.label: Product indicators
elements.description: Three circular indicators below the product display, suggesting options or features.

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.label: Discount message
elements.description: Text stating 'Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now' in a prominent, eye-catching font.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label in the top left corner marked 'UGC' in a simple, bold font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, bright badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in a contrasting color.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The text 'Try for free' is displayed in a clear, inviting font at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, VantaStyle logo, discount message, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the product display and indicators, with the discount message in the center and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now, Try for free, VantaStyle, SALE, UGC
